title: Escape to Life: The Erika and Klaus Mann Story
original_title: Escape to Life: The Erika and Klaus Mann Story
overview: This documentary contains dramatized episodes about the lives of Erika and Klaus Mann, the brilliant children of German writer Thomas Mann.
